name: multi-llm-marketplace
description: Skylence multi-LLM marketplace: core baseline and agent-org plugins (Solo and Herdr substrates) for Grok, Claude, Codex, Antigravity.

plugins.name: core-grok
plugins.description: Opinionated Grok baseline: /core-grok:setup seeds ~/.grok/judge-rules.json and writes the core guidelines (Advisor, Decisive Thinking, Coding, Review Mindset, Writing + compaction survival) into ~/.grok/AGENTS.md. Ships Grok-native judge-hook (PreToolUse, including skyline_run), writing-guard, research-nudge Stop hook. Hook paths use exact ${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT} load-time substitution.

plugins.name: soloterm-agent-org-grok
plugins.description: Skylence agent-org v2 for Grok. Bundles the Solo MCP server (board/PTY/timer substrate) + orchestrator, planner (max-effort grounded plans), solo-worker, replacer, org-audit skills, build-slot serializer, ghost-probe scripts. Session-discipline hooks (lane mark, conduct refresh, stop gate) use exact ${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT} load-time paths.

plugins.name: herdr-agent-org-grok
plugins.description: Skylence agent-org for Grok on Herdr substrate. Orchestrator, planner, herdr-worker, replacer, org-audit + herdr control skill; filesystem board CLI; dispatch-worker; build-slot; ghost-probe. Dispatches via herdr agent start in real panes (no Solo MCP). Session-discipline hooks use exact ${GROK_PLUGIN_ROOT} load-time paths. Requires HERDR_ENV=1 and herdr >= 0.7.
